query: current session dashboard observability user management

results.title: Astro dashboard header session and toast feedback
results.reason: added: recalled for the current task
results.content: Added a clients-page session badge and logout button in the shared Astro layout, backed by a session-header script that loads the admin session and calls the logout API. Added a shared dashboard toast region and used it for client creation, key rotation/revocation, connection tests, and snippet copy actions while keeping inline status text for context-sensitive detail feedback.

results.title: FindTourGo auth cross-tab readiness fix
results.reason: added: recalled for the current task
results.content: Follow-up fix after auth refactor review: useSession storage-event handling now recalculates sessionMeta (isRecovering/isReady) from the latest session snapshot before updating local state, preventing tabs from getting stuck in not-ready state after cross-tab login/logout. AuthProvider refresh success now also emits notifySessionChange so sibling tabs update immediately when cookies are refreshed in another tab.

results.title: FindTourGo auth refactor bootstrap recovery
results.reason: added: recalled for the current task
results.content: Refactored FindTourGo auth flow around a single session snapshot in AuthService. Added getSessionSnapshot/hasValidSession/isSessionRecoverable so UI can distinguish authenticated vs recoverable session. useSession now exposes isRecovering and isReady, preventing private layouts/pages from redirecting while the app is still trying to restore a session from a valid refresh token. AuthProvider now performs immediate refresh on bootstrap when access token is gone but refresh token remains, dedupes concurrent refreshes, and restarts the timer using JWT iat decoded from the token instead of client time. changeAuth now preserves or accepts deviceSessionId explicitly, and fast-access supports passing device_session_id. Also corrected 401 logout handling and enabled auth error handling on authenticated HTTP clients.

results.title: Dashboard integration flow guarded by server state
results.reason: added: recalled for the current task
results.content: The Astro dashboard cannot be treated as a blind static site for admin flows. The correct integration is stateful at the Python layer: /dashboard redirects to /dashboard/setup when no admin exists, to /dashboard/login when admins exist but there is no valid session, and to /dashboard/clients when an admin session is present. Static asset requests under /dashboard must bypass those auth redirects. Frontend JSON admin calls should also redirect 401 responses back to login/setup so the browser flow stays coherent.

results.title: Phase 4.1 requirements refined for setup and direct auth
results.reason: kept active: still relevant to the current task
results.content: Reviewed and rewrote docs/requirements/p4_1_dashboard_setup_and_direct_auth.md to align with Minder's actual auth model. Key correction: admin auth remains API-key based, so the requirements now target first-run /setup, admin API-key recovery via CLI, and direct client_api_key parity across transports instead of inventing password auth. The doc now distinguishes current baseline capabilities already present in code (/dashboard/login browser flow, SSE X-Minder-Client-Key, token exchange, onboarding routes) from the remaining gaps to implement. It also preserves token exchange as a supported compatibility path and records open questions around stdio bootstrap shape, session invalidation on recovery, and whether first-admin setup needs an extra deployment secret.
